_comment_personal_http: Personal-machine HTTP deployment, CLIENT side. The kb-mcp daemon runs as a long-lived OS service on 127.0.0.1:3100; this .mcp.json points every Claude Code / Cursor session at that one daemon. Drop this file into each project root, OR put it once at ~/.config/claude/.mcp.json so every project shares it. No kb-mcp binary spawn happens client-side — this is just an HTTP MCP client.
_comment_alwaysLoad: alwaysLoad: true is a Claude Code v2.1.121+ option that ensures kb-mcp's tools are present at initial load (skips tool-search lookup latency). Other MCP clients (Cursor, etc.) ignore the field. The daemon stays warm across sessions, so the per-session startup cost is negligible — keep enabled.
